2604.21579.title: A Metamorphic Testing Approach to Diagnosing Memorization in LLM-Based Program Repair
2604.21579.paper_summary: LLM-based automated program repair (APR) techniques have shown promising results in reducing debugging costs. However, prior results can be affected by data leakage: large language models (LLMs) may memorize bug fixes when evaluation benchmarks overlap with their pretraining data, leading to inflated performance estimates. In this paper, we investigate whether we can better reveal data leakage by combining metamorphic testing (MT) with negative log-likelihood (NLL), which has been used in prior work as a proxy for memorization. We construct variant benchmarks by applying semantics-preserving transformations to two widely used datasets, Defects4J and GitBug-Java. Using these benchmarks, we evaluate the repair success rates of seven LLMs on both original and transformed versions, and analyze the relationship between performance degradation and NLL. Our results show that all evaluated state-of-the-art LLMs exhibit substantial drops in patch generation success rates on transformed benchmarks, ranging from -4.1% for GPT-4o to -15.98% for Llama-3.1. Furthermore, we find that this degradation strongly correlates with NLL on the original benchmarks, suggesting that models perform better on instances they are more likely to have memorized. These findings show that combining MT with NLL provides stronger and more reliable evidence of data leakage, while metamorphic testing alone can help mitigate its effects in LLM-based APR evaluations.
2604.21579.paper_summary_zh: LLM 基礎的自動程式修復 (APR) 技術在降低除錯成本方面顯示出令人鼓舞的結果。<lb/>然而，先前的結果可能會受到數據洩漏的影響：大型語言模型 (LLMs) 可能會記住錯誤修正，當評估基準與其預訓練數據重疊時，這會導致性能估計的膨脹。<lb/>在本文中，我們探討是否可以通過將變形測試 (MT) 與負對數似然 (NLL) 結合來更好地揭示數據洩漏，NLL 在先前的工作中被用作記憶的代理。<lb/>我們通過對兩個廣泛使用的數據集 Defects4J 和 GitBug-Java 應用語義保持轉換來構建變體基準。<lb/>使用這些基準，我們評估七個 LLM 在原始和轉換版本上的修復成功率，並分析性能下降與 NLL 之間的關係。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，所有評估的最先進 LLM 在轉換基準上的補丁生成成功率均顯著下降，範圍從 GPT-4o 的 -4.1% 到 Llama-3.1 的 -15.98%。<lb/>此外，我們發現這種下降與原始基準上的 NLL 之間存在強相關性，這表明模型在更可能記住的實例上表現更好。<lb/>這些發現表明，將 MT 與 NLL 結合提供了更強和更可靠的數據洩漏證據，而僅僅使用變形測試可以幫助減輕其在基於 LLM 的 APR 評估中的影響。
2604.21579.author: Milan De Koning et.al.
2604.21579.authors: Milan De Koning, Ali Asgari, Pouria Derakhshanfar, Annibale Panichella
